name: Taxonomy Mapping review for Autophagy Induction bundle
summary: Taxonomy mapping passes for revision 1. Direct autophagy, spermidine/polyamine, and autophagic-flux records are staged under Autophagy Induction, while FMD, trehalose, cardiometabolic, immune, exercise, mTOR, and broad aging-review overlap is explicitly caveated. The bundle correctly excludes NCT07255300 and NCT07354620 from public staging as adjacent or attribution-limited context.

findings.claim_or_issue: Several staged or screened sources sit near nutrient-sensing, immune-rejuvenation, mTOR modulation, metabolic, and exercise biology.
findings.why_it_matters: Autophagy Induction claims would be overstated if these adjacent mechanisms were collapsed into macroautophagic-flux evidence.
findings.recommended_action: No revision required. The staged outlook and coverage assessment keep the boundary explicit and defer adjacent FMD follow-up and rapamycin/ProLon methylation context.
